'''Nardix''' was [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Sector governor]] who was captured by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]] and [[4-LOM/Legends|4-LOM]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the two turned him over to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], who tried and convicted Nardix for "crimes against Humanity". The event caused much embarrassment for the Empire.

The hunt for the Sector Governor gave Zuckuss and 4-LOM a level of notoriety,<ref name="InsiderSpEd">{{InsiderCite|Special Edition 2012|Bounty Hunters' Guild Handbook (article)}}</ref> and when [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] recruited the pair to hunt down Rebel [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], Zuckuss could sense that Vader knew about their involvement with Nardix's apprehension. However, Zuckuss also sensed Vader didn't care, as recruiting the best of the bounty hunters was more important to him than punishing them.
